industries.title: AI Automation for
industries.description: We understand the unique challenges of Alberta businesses — from oilfield services in Calgary to clinics in Edmonton and trades across the province.

items.title: Construction & Trades
items.description: AI chatbots that capture leads after hours, automated scheduling, instant quote generation, and follow-up sequences that turn inquiries into booked jobs.

items.title: Real Estate
items.description: AI-powered property matching, automated showing bookings, lead nurturing via SMS/email, and market analysis reports generated in seconds.

items.title: Healthcare & Clinics
items.description: HIPAA-aware patient communication, automated appointment reminders, after-hours intake bots, and PIPEDA-compliant document processing.

items.title: Energy & Oilfield
items.description: Predictive maintenance alerts, automated compliance reporting, equipment monitoring dashboards, and intelligent dispatch for field crews.

items.title: Professional Services
items.description: Automated client onboarding, AI-powered proposal generation, document intake bots, and CRM workflows that keep your pipeline full.

items.title: Retail & E-commerce
items.description: AI product recommendations, automated inventory alerts, customer support chatbots, and personalized email campaigns that drive repeat sales.

aiServices.title: AI
aiServices.description: Production-ready AI automation that generates leads, reduces costs, and scales your Alberta business — from chatbots to full workflow automation.

items.title: AI Chatbots & Lead Capture
items.description: 24/7 AI chatbots that qualify leads, answer FAQs, and book appointments on your website, Facebook, and SMS. Never miss another after-hours inquiry.

items.title: AI Voice Agents
items.description: Human-sounding AI voice agents that answer calls, schedule appointments, handle customer service, and route urgent calls — 24/7 without hiring.

items.title: Workflow Automation
items.description: Connect your CRM, email, calendar, and tools with intelligent automation. Auto-follow-ups, task creation, document generation, and data syncing.

items.title: CRM Setup & Optimization
items.description: Implement and optimize HubSpot, Salesforce, Zoho, or Go High Level with AI-powered lead scoring, automated pipelines, and smart follow-ups.

items.title: AI Search Optimization (GEO)
items.description: Optimize your business to appear in ChatGPT, Claude, and Perplexity recommendations. The new SEO is being cited by AI when customers ask for referrals.

projects.name: TaxApp
projects.description: Modern tax preparation portal with guided filing and secure document uploads.
projects.aiOutcome: Before: Manual data entry from W-2s and receipts caused errors and delays. After: OCR + AI extracts data from uploaded documents with 98.5% accuracy, pre-filling returns and flagging anomalies.

projects.name: Chroma Care Labs
projects.description: Clinical lab management platform with automated reporting and compliance tracking.
projects.aiOutcome: Before: Lab technicians manually transcribed test results and drafted patient reports. After: NLP pipelines auto-generate structured reports, flag critical values, and route alerts to clinicians.

philosophy.title: We don't just build tech.
philosophy.description: Based in Edmonton, Alberta, CodeLeaf is an AI automation and marketing agency serving businesses across Calgary, Edmonton, and all of Alberta. We specialize in AI chatbots, voice agents, CRM automation, and lead generation systems that help local businesses compete and win in an AI-powered economy. Like a leaf, every business needs the right environment to thrive. We provide the AI automation, strategy, and technical foundation for your business to flourish.
